steps: File NTA Form 11 refund application for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo Co Ltd dividends
Submit JP-NO tax treaty certificate confirming 10% treaty rate eligibility to MUFG Custody
Request MUFG Custody correct future Nintendo dividend processing to apply 10% treaty rate automatically
Follow up with NTA on refund status within 30 days of submission

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
NTA – Application Forms for Income Tax Convention (Form 1 for dividends)
